name: 36_Music_Emotion_Classification_SVM_GTZAN_ML
query: Nisaidie kuendeleza mradi wa uainishaji wa hisia za muziki kwa kutumia mfano wa SVM na seti ya data ya GTZAN. Mradi unapaswa kujumuisha usindikaji wa sauti kwa kutumia librosa kwa kuondoa kelele na kusawazisha, uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC na viwango 13, na matumizi ya kisanidi cha SVM cha mstari na urekebishaji wa hyperparameter. Upakiaji wa seti ya data, usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kusawazisha, na uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC lazima utekelezwe katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza kisanidi cha SVM katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi matokeo ya uainishaji katika `results/predictions.txt`, onyesha taswira za sauti za spectrogram kwa kutumia librosa (kuhifadhi katika `results/figures/`), na unda ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia Streamlit ambao unaruhusu upakiaji wa faili za sauti kwa wakati halisi na kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na spectrogram katika `results/figures/`. Hakikisha usimamizi mzuri wa rasilimali kwa kuzingatia usimamizi wa moja kwa moja wa uzinduzi na kumaliza kwa ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit.

requirements.criteria: Hisia za muziki za "GTZAN" zimepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kusawazisha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Taswira za sauti za spectrogram zimeonyeshwa kwa kutumia "librosa" na zimehifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.
Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano umeundwa katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na spectrogram katika `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa "Streamlit" unapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kupakia faili mpya za sauti na kuona matokeo ya uainishaji kwa wakati halisi.
Taswira za spectrogram zinapaswa kujumuisha chaguo za kurekebisha safu ya masafa na azimio la muda kwa uchambuzi wa kina.
Mfumo unapaswa kufanya usimamizi mzuri wa rasilimali hasa katika kusimamia uzinduzi na kumaliza kwa ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit.

judge_stats.criteria: Hisia za muziki za "GTZAN" zimepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder. It contains a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary with a "loaded" status and notes, but there is no actual implementation for loading the "GTZAN" music emotion dataset. The file does not contain code to read audio files, access a dataset path, or load specific GTZAN data. The trajectory evidence only confirms the file executed without runtime errors, not that it fulfills the functional requirement of loading the dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kusawazisha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:

judge_stats.criteria: Uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder containing only documentation strings, requirement lists, and stub functions. There is no actual implementation of MFCC feature extraction. The `load_dataset()` function returns a dummy dictionary, and there is no code using libraries like `librosa` or `python_speech_features` to compute MFCCs from audio data. The trajectory evidence describes successful execution, but the actual file content does not contain the required feature extraction logic.

<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/model.py` does not contain an actual SVM classifier implementation. The file only contains a minimal semantic implementation with placeholder functions (`requirement_notes()` and `build_model()`), requirement criteria definitions, and keywords. There is no code that imports scikit-learn's SVM, defines an SVM model (e.g., `SVC()` or `LinearSVC()`), configures hyperparameters, or implements training/prediction logic for an SVM classifier. The `build_model()` function returns a string placeholder, not an actual SVM model object.

<UNSATISFIED>

The `results/predictions.txt` file contains only the placeholder text `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which does not represent actual classification results. The file was saved successfully, but its content is not valid prediction output.

judge_stats.criteria: Taswira za sauti za spectrogram zimeonyeshwa kwa kutumia "librosa" na zimehifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided evidence does not demonstrate that audio spectrogram visualizations are created using "librosa" and saved in `results/figures/`. The workspace structure shows a `results\figures` directory exists, but the content of the key files (`data_loader.py`, `model.py`, and `app.py` from the tree) does not contain any code for spectrogram generation, display with `librosa.display.specshow`, or saving with `plt.savefig`. The trajectory evidence references these actions, but it is explicitly stated as "for reference only and does not serve as decisive evidence." The decisive code evidence from the project files is missing the required implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano umeundwa katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na spectrogram katika `results/figures/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The Streamlit app in `src/app.py` fails to display classification results and spectrograms because it encounters a `FileNotFoundError` when trying to access the `results/figures/` directory during execution, causing the application to terminate. The trajectory evidence confirms the app starts but crashes due to missing required files, indicating the requirement is not fully met.
